search.query: | inputlookup approval_stage_trackuc | eval firstsource="approval" | inputlookup append=true initial_stage_tk | eval secondsource="initial" | eval source=coalesce(firstsource,secondsource) |eval convertTime= strptime(updatetime,"%d/%m/%Y, %H:%M:%S") | sort 0 convertTime | rex field=id "_(?<creationDate>[0-9]+?)$" | eval creationDate= tonumber(creationDate)/1000| eval theTimer=if($the_time_option$== 500,true,false) | where ( creationDate > relative_time(now(),"-$the_time_option$d")) or theTimer == true

| eval isapproved= if(source=="initial","",isapproved) | eval convertTime= strptime(updatetime,"%d/%m/%Y, %H:%M:%S") | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id source | where maxTime == convertTime | fields - maxTime | sort 0 convertTime | eventstats count as duplicate by id | eventstats last(comment) as l_comment last(assigned_to) as l_assigned_to last(stage) as l_stage last(updatedby) as l_updatedby last(isapproved) as l_isapproved by id | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id | where maxTime == convertTime | stats count

| eval isapproved= if(source=="initial","",isapproved) | eval convertTime= strptime(updatetime,"%d/%m/%Y, %H:%M:%S") | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id source | where maxTime == convertTime | fields - maxTime | sort 0 convertTime | eventstats count as duplicate by id | eventstats last(comment) as l_comment last(assigned_to) as l_assigned_to last(stage) as l_stage last(updatedby) as l_updatedby last(isapproved) as l_isapproved by id | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id | where maxTime == convertTime | stats count by request_type

| eval isapproved= if(source=="initial","",isapproved) | eval convertTime= strptime(updatetime,"%d/%m/%Y, %H:%M:%S") | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id source | where maxTime == convertTime | fields - maxTime | sort 0 convertTime | eventstats count as duplicate by id | eventstats last(comment) as l_comment last(assigned_to) as l_assigned_to last(stage) as l_stage last(updatedby) as l_updatedby last(isapproved) as l_isapproved by id | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id | where maxTime == convertTime | stats count by stage

| eval isapproved= if(source=="initial","",isapproved) | eval convertTime= strptime(updatetime,"%d/%m/%Y, %H:%M:%S") | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id source | where maxTime == convertTime | fields - maxTime | sort 0 convertTime | eventstats count as duplicate by id | eventstats last(comment) as l_comment last(assigned_to) as l_assigned_to last(stage) as l_stage last(updatedby) as l_updatedby last(isapproved) as l_isapproved by id | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id | where maxTime == convertTime | stats count by detection_solution

| eventstats last(stage) as last_stage max(convertTime) as max_convertTime by id | search last_stage="closed" OR last_stage="discarded" | eval calculatedTime = (max_convertTime-creationDate)/(60*60) | stats avg(calculatedTime) as avg_calculatedTime

| streamstats window=2 current=f last(convertTime) as priv_convertTime last(stage) as priv_stage | search priv_stage="approval_review" | eval calculatedTime = (convertTime-priv_convertTime)/(60*60) | stats avg(calculatedTime) as calculatedTime

| streamstats window=2 current=f last(convertTime) as priv_convertTime last(stage) as priv_stage | search priv_stage="implementation" | eval calculatedTime = (convertTime-priv_convertTime)/(60*60) | stats avg(calculatedTime) as calculatedTime

| streamstats window=2 current=f last(convertTime) as priv_convertTime last(stage) as priv_stage | search priv_stage="senior_review" | eval calculatedTime = (convertTime-priv_convertTime)/(60*60) | stats avg(calculatedTime) as calculatedTime

| eval isapproved= if(source=="initial","",isapproved) | eval convertTime= strptime(updatetime,"%d/%m/%Y, %H:%M:%S") | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id source | where maxTime == convertTime | fields - maxTime | sort 0 convertTime | eventstats count as duplicate by id | eventstats last(comment) as l_comment last(assigned_to) as l_assigned_to last(stage) as l_stage last(updatedby) as l_updatedby last(isapproved) as l_isapproved by id | eventstats max(convertTime) as maxTime by id | where maxTime == convertTime | stats count by detection_name request_type | eventstats sum(count) as total by detection_name | stats list(request_type) as request_type list(count) as count by detection_name total | table detection_name request_type count total | sort 0 - total
| search source="approval" | stats dc(id) as tickets by updatedby
